arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham watch on as Randal Kolo Muani loan falls into doubt despite confirmation
arts.sum: Randal Kolo Muani's expected loan move to Juventus has been thrown into doubt in bizarre circumstances, though it is not a situation that is expected to put Arsenal or Tottenham Hotspur on high alert. PSG have discovered they have already reached the maximum six senior players they are allowed to have loaned out at any one given time, therefore are scrambling to resolve the issue before Kolo Muani's move can be confirmed.
